title: Amtech I6350 3 Piece universal joint set
features: DURABLE: This 3 piece universal joint set is made from chrome plated, drop forged, hardened steel for durability
VERSATILE: Designed to lock onto a ratchet or extension bar, the set includes 6mm (1/4"), 10mm (3/8") and 13mm (1/2") drives with 360° swivel heads for multi-angle access
MULTI-DRIVE: Compatible with 1/4" and other common drive sizes
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 3x Drive universal joint (1/4-inch, 3/8-inch, 1/2-inch) See more
